home.title: Sebastian Weszler
home.subtitle: Engineering Leader | CTO | Technical Co-Founder
home.description: Technical leader who builds products, teams, and businesses. I combine deep engineering expertise with entrepreneurial experience to drive innovation and deliver results.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Born and raised in Poland, I studied Electronic Engineering, which laid the foundation for my technical journey.
about.paragraph1: After graduation, I worked as a Technician, then founded and operated a successful online bicycle store — learning firsthand what it takes to build a business from the ground up.
about.paragraph2: My passion for building and innovating led me back to engineering. Today, I lead technical architecture and development, leveraging my unique blend of hands-on engineering expertise and entrepreneurial experience to build products that drive real business outcomes.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Open-source work, tools, and experiments that reflect my engineering leadership and full-stack capabilities.
projects.experienceLeadDesc: Leading technical architecture, mentoring engineering teams, and establishing development workflows. Driving engineering excellence across the full stack while making strategic technology decisions that balance innovation with business constraints.
projects.experienceEntrepreneurDesc: Founded and scaled an online retail business — managing product, engineering, supply chain, marketing, and customer experience. Built custom tooling for inventory management, CRM, and data-driven pricing.
projects.experienceTechDesc: Technical problem-solving and systems maintenance following studies in Electronic Engineering. Foundation in hardware-software integration and diagnostic workflows.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Thoughts on software engineering, technology, and building products.
blog.thanksForReading: Thanks for reading! If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to contact me.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Technical leader building products, teams, and businesses — from architecture to revenue.
resume.profileBody: Engineering leader with a unique blend of deep technical expertise and hands-on entrepreneurial experience. Founded and scaled an e-commerce business from zero to revenue, then returned to engineering leadership — bringing business acumen, product sensibility, and a bias toward action. Proven track record of architecting full-stack applications, building engineering teams, and making strategic technology decisions that drive measurable business outcomes. Seeking CTO or VP Engineering roles where I can shape technical vision, cultivate engineering culture, and deliver products that matter.
resume.experienceLeadDesc: Leading technical architecture, development, and engineering culture for complex web applications. Establishing CI/CD pipelines, code review workflows, and development standards. Mentoring engineers and driving adoption of modern practices including TypeScript, automated testing, and performance optimization. Translating business requirements into technical roadmaps and making architecture decisions that balance speed, quality, and maintainability.
resume.experienceLeadAchievement1: Designed and implemented scalable full-stack architectures using Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js
resume.experienceLeadAchievement2: Established engineering workflows including CI/CD, code review, and automated testing pipelines
resume.experienceLeadAchievement3: Mentored junior developers and fostered a culture of engineering excellence
resume.experienceLeadAchievement4: Architected i18n system supporting multi-language content delivery across all pages
resume.experienceEntrepreneurDesc: Founded and scaled an online bicycle retail business, managing the full lifecycle from concept to profitable operation. Built custom software tooling for inventory management, CRM, and pricing optimization. Gained deep experience in product development, customer acquisition, supply chain logistics, and financial management — the complete operational stack that CTOs need to understand.
resume.experienceEntrepreneurAchievement1: Built and scaled e-commerce platform with custom inventory and CRM tooling
resume.experienceEntrepreneurAchievement2: Managed end-to-end business operations: product, supply chain, marketing, finance
resume.experienceEntrepreneurAchievement3: Developed data-driven pricing and inventory optimization frameworks
resume.experienceTechDesc: Technical problem-solving and systems maintenance following studies in Electronic Engineering. Foundation in hardware-software integration, diagnostics, and structured troubleshooting methodologies.
resume.skillLeadershipItems: Technical Vision · Team Building · Architecture Planning · Cross-functional Collaboration · Mentoring · Agile/Scrum
